sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52163" key="kakodiaithsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-δῐαιτησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52163.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bad habit of life</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:92" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.92</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
